description: Multi-turn: create connector -> inspect via get -> test connectivity (covers `neomind connector get` + `connector test`).

turns.user: Add an MQTT broker: name probe-broker, host 10.0.0.99, port 1883.
Show the detailed status of probe-broker.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent runs `neomind connector create --name probe-broker --host 10.0.0.99 --port 1883`, parses id
Turn 3: Agent runs `neomind connector test <id>` (connectivity failure is a valid answer, but tool must run)
expectations.overall: Last two turns must reuse the id from turn 1
